---
title: "Transforming data (todo)"
webr:
  resources:
    - ../data/dutch_demographics.csv
    - ../data/dutch_elections_2023.csv
    - ../data/shapes_nl.rds
---

{{< include ../_extensions/r-wasm/live/_knitr.qmd >}}
{{< include ../_extensions/r-wasm/live/_gradethis.qmd >}}

## Recoding data

## Grouping and summarizing data
